[Guid("4460B3AE-4B44-4527-8676-7548A8ACD260")]

public interface IAudioEffectsManager

Methods

GetAudioEffects(out nint, out uint)

Gets the current list of audio effects for the associated audio stream.

numEffects uint

Returns

int

Registers a notification callback for audio effect list or state changes.

Parameters

client nint

Returns

int

Sets the state of a mutable audio effect.
